name: Tylos Rubio
titles: Tylos Rubio Knight-Errant, Former Codicier of the Ultramarines
lore: Tylos Rubio was the first to be recruited into the Knights-Errant by Nathaniel Garro, who travelled to reach Calth at the very moment of the Word Bearers’ betrayal of the Calth Conjunction. When he was forced by circumstance in those battles to use his psychic powers, which he had foresworn in accordance with the Edict of Nikaea, Rubio’s battle-brothers turned their backs upon him and he agreed to join Garro and return to Terra with him. Donning a psychic hood and taking up his force sword once more, the ability to counter the powers of the Warp would prove as valuable to the Sigillite’s cause as a thousand boltguns.
